name: Unsafe gets()
description: Detects use of unsafe gets() function in C.

name: Unsafe strcpy/strcat
description: Detects use of unsafe strcpy() or strcat() in C.
suggestion: Consider 'strncpy()' or 'strncat()' for safer string handling.

name: Missing Semicolon (C)
description: Detects missing semicolons at the end of statements in C.
suggestion: Add a semicolon at the end of the statement.

name: Assignment in Condition
description: Detects assignment (=) instead of comparison (==) in if/while conditions.
message: Potential Syntax Error: Assignment '=' used in condition.
suggestion: Use '==' for comparison inside the condition.

name: Memory Management
suggestion: Ensure every malloc() has a corresponding free() to avoid memory leaks.

name: Unresolved TODOs
message: Unresolved TODO or FIXME comments found.
suggestion: Address the pending task or remove the comment if it's no longer relevant.
